title: xiaoyi-ssg Content Types Schema
description: Markdown front-matter schema for content sources. render.js does NOT read this for rendering — it reads template-manifest.json sources. This file is used by the AI for authoring guidance and (optionally) by the markdown adapter to validate front-matter. See prompts/content-type-definition.md.

label.description: Human-readable name shown in nav and llms.txt section headers

dir.description: Content directory relative to site root. Conventionally `source/<type>`. Must match the corresponding markdown source's `dir` in template-manifest.json.

nav_order.description: Ordering of content types in the primary nav and llms.txt sections. Type names listed here must exist in `types`.

type.description: Field type. See prompts/content-type-definition.md §Field Type Validation Rules.

required.description: Whether this field must appear in the front-matter

default.description: Default value when the field is absent in the front-matter
